title: Another Edition
description: The Technology and Adventure Modpack of my Dreams...
body:
# ![Another Edition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/315cb55c8345edcd028d64bb6a4776b080cf266d.png) **The Technology and Adventure Modpack of my Dreams...** **Another Edition** aims to be my perfect modpack *- a blend of technology and adventure -*. It might not be suited to everyone, but it’s built to reflect my ideal Minecraft experience.

**Ender Compass**, **Encyclopedia Universalis** and **Nether Igniter**: --- Inspired by early **Beta Minecraft / BTA** and **1.12.2 / 1.7.10 Technology Modpack**
